#1 Core Strategy
▪ 	Always be focused building your email list
▪ 	Social followers are nice, but it’s not the same
▪ 	Your wealth is in the list
▪ 	This is so important that I’m giving you the Launching
Your List Bonus Course
Module One - Building Your List
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 10 --

List Basics
▪ 	You’ll have two lists:
▪ 	Prospects (they have not bought anything from you yet)
▪ 	Clients (they’ve bought something from you)
▪ 	This list is 10x-15x more powerful than your
prospect list
Module One - Building Your List
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 10 --

Starting Out
▪ 	I stumbled on list building early
▪ 	Before I even had a webpage
▪ 	The list gives you power and control
▪ 	Social media platforms could go away
▪ 	Your list is your most important asset
▪ 	Develop an obsession with building a list
Module One - Building Your List
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 10 --

Lead Acquisition
▪ 	Important metrics to look at:
▪ 	How well you’re getting people to join your list
▪ 	Your relationship with that list
Module One - Building Your List
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 10 --

Important Truths
▪ 	You don’t need a HUGE list
▪ 	No one starts with an email list
▪ 	Build early and often
▪ 	Conversions from your first 1000 subscribers are going
to be strong
▪ 	Smaller lists often convert better
▪ 	Relationship / connection
▪ 	Engagement / recency
Module One - Building Your List
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
